message:
chore(artifacts): update section 10.15 verification evidence and ambient authority findings

Update verification artifacts for two section 10.15 beads (bd-2g6r and
bd-721z) with refreshed evidence JSON and summary markdown. Also update
the top-level ambient_authority_findings.json with current scan results.

- artifacts/10.15/ambient_authority_findings.json: updated finding metadata
- artifacts/section_10_15/bd-2g6r/verification_evidence.json: refreshed
- artifacts/section_10_15/bd-2g6r/verification_summary.md: refreshed
- artifacts/section_10_15/bd-721z/verification_evidence.json: refreshed
- artifacts/section_10_15/bd-721z/verification_summary.md: refreshed

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
